slides.title: We believe in four guiding principles for a strong operating model
principleBodies: Start with the commercial priorities that matter most and align the work around where the program can create visible value first.
Keep choices practical by linking strategic direction to the day-to-day decisions teams will actually need to make.
Focus governance on decisions, sequencing, and accountability rather than adding process for its own sake.
Build momentum through a delivery approach that balances quick wins with the structural changes required for scale.
